name: escalationCheck
_note: Pure compute — checks an incident's minutes-open against the per-severity threshold (sev1 5m / sev2 15m / sev3 60m / sev4 240m). No STATE, no actor dependency → {} returns ok:true (NEVER no_db). minutesOpen is a fail-CLOSED numeric guard — a poisoned value (NaN/Infinity/-1/1e308) → invalid_minutesOpen. The final invariant pins the breach decision: breached iff minutesOpen >= thresholdMinutes (sev1@30m over the 5m threshold IS breached).
